zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV於大約1342年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾梅爾布恩時，他的父親John Fraunceys39歲，母親Matilda Margaret Beaufoy41歲。他於大約1359年與Cecily De Beaufoy在英國英格蘭德比夏爾德比結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1380年在他的家鄉享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV于大约1342年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾梅爾布恩时，他的父亲John Fraunceys39岁，母亲Matilda Margaret Beaufoy41岁。他于大约1359年与Cecily De Beaufoy在英国英格兰德比夏爾德比结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1380年在他的家乡享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: Francis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Italian Francesco , originally a vocabulary word meaning ‘French’ or ‘Frenchman’ (Late Latin Franciscus; compare Frank ). This was a nickname given to St Francis of Assisi ( 1181–1226 ) because of his wealthy father's business connections with France. His baptismal name was Giovanni . He had a pleasant, ordinary life as a child and young man, but after two serious illnesses, a period of military service, and a year as a prisoner of war in Perugia, he turned from the world and devoted himself to caring for the poor and sick. He was joined by groups of disciples, calling themselves ‘minor friars’ (friari minores). The main features of the Franciscan rule are humility, poverty, and love for all living creatures. The given name occurs occasionally in England as early as 1300 , and more frequently from the early 16th century, when there was a surge of admiration for, and imitation of, Italian Renaissance culture.

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Italian Francesco , originally a vocabulary word meaning ‘French’ or ‘Frenchman’ (Late Latin Franciscus; compare Frank ). This was a nickname given to St Francis of Assisi ( 1181–1226 ) because of his wealthy father's business connections with France. His baptismal name was Giovanni . He had a pleasant, ordinary life as a child and young man, but after two serious illnesses, a period of military service, and a year as a prisoner of war in Perugia, he turned from the world and devoted himself to caring for the poor and sick. He was joined by groups of disciples, calling themselves ‘minor friars’ (friari minores). The main features of the Franciscan rule are humility, poverty, and love for all living creatures. The given name occurs occasionally in England as early as 1300 , and more frequently from the early 16th century, when there was a surge of admiration for, and imitation of, Italian Renaissance culture.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV was born about 1342, in Melbourne, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Fraunceys, was 39 and his mother, Matilda Margaret Beaufoy, was 41. He married Cecily De Beaufoy about 1359, in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1380, in his hometown, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV est né environ 1342, à Melbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Fraunceys, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Matilda Margaret Beaufoy, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Cecily De Beaufoy environ 1359, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1380, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV um 1342 in Melbourne, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Fraunceys 39 und seine Mutter Matilda Margaret Beaufoy 41. Er hat um 1359 in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Cecily De Beaufoy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1380 im Alter von 40 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV è nato il circa 1342 nel Melbourne, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Fraunceys, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Matilda Margaret Beaufoy, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Cecily De Beaufoy circa 1359, nel Derby, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1380, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IVが約1342年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアメルボウルンで生まれた時，父John Fraunceysは39歳，母Matilda Margaret Beaufoyは41歳であった。約1359年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーでCecily De Beaufoyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1380年に故郷で40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV(이)가 대략 1342년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 멜보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Fraunceys(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda Margaret Beaufoy(은)는 41세였다. 그는 대략 1359년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 더비에서 Cecily De Beaufoy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1380년 그의 고향에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV nasceu aproximadamente 1342, em Melbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Fraunceys, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Margaret Beaufoy, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecily De Beaufoy aproximadamente 1359, em Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1380, em sua cidade natal, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV родился около 1342 г. в местности мелбурн, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Fraunceys было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Margaret Beaufoy, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecily De Beaufoy около 1359 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1380 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV nació aproximadamente 1342, en Melbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Fraunceys, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Matilda Margaret Beaufoy, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Cecily De Beaufoy aproximadamente 1359, en Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1380, en su pueblo, a la edad de 40 años.
